function.arguments:
{"code": "import json

# Read the full articles data from the file
with open(var_functions.query_db:40, 'r') as f:
    articles = json.load(f)

print("Total articles loaded:", len(articles))

# Define sports keywords
sports_keywords = [
    "game", "team", "player", "coach", "season", "league", "championship", "tournament",
    "sport", "football", "basketball", "soccer", "baseball", "hockey", "tennis", "golf",
    "olympic", "olympics", "nba", "nfl", "mlb", "nhl", "athlete", "athletes", "match",
    "racing", "marathon", "world cup", "cricket", "rugby", "volleyball", "swimming",
    "cycling", "skiing", "boxing", "wrestling", "gymnastics", "medal", "medals",
    "champion", "champions", "finals", "playoff", "playoffs", "score", "scored",
    "winning", "losing", "victory", "defeat", "stadium", "arena", "court", "field"
]

# Find sports articles and track the one with longest description
sports_articles = []
max_desc_len = 0
article_with_longest_desc = None

for article in articles:
    title_lower = article.get("title", "").lower()
    desc_lower = article.get("description", "").lower()
    
    # Check if it's a sports article
    is_sports = any(keyword in title_lower or keyword in desc_lower for keyword in sports_keywords)
    
    if is_sports:
        desc = article.get("description", "")
        desc_len = len(desc)
        
        sports_articles.append({
            "title": article.get("title"),
            "description": desc,
            "desc_len": desc_len,
            "article_id": article.get("article_id")
        })
        
        if desc_len > max_desc_len:
            max_desc_len = desc_len
            article_with_longest_desc = article.get("title")

print(f"Found {len(sports_articles)} sports articles")

if sports_articles:
    # Sort by description length to verify our result
    sorted_sports = sorted(sports_articles, key=lambda x: x["desc_len"], reverse=True)
    print(f"\nTop 5 sports articles by description length:")
    for i, art in enumerate(sorted_sports[:5]):
        print(f"{i+1}. Length: {art['desc_len']}, Title: {art['title']}")
    
    result_title = article_with_longest_desc
else:
    result_title = "No sports articles found"

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(result_title))"}
